text.title: Technical Debt Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals to apply / skip / route-elsewhere. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Codebase >= 3 months old AND velocity declining OR debt-driven incident?

conclusion.verdict: too early for systematic debt management

branch.question: Capacity contract <= 90 days AND no trigger?

conclusion.verdict: run register + score + capacity contract + prevention

text.example: applies=true -> recent_contract=false -> run full register (rule register-typed).
